contribution: Anchor writer. Established the core haunted library atmosphere, the Vestibule and Reading Room scenes with focus on architectural dread and the pervasive whispering phenomenon that drives the mystery.

Specialist writer. Contributed sensory dread and threat implication to the Restricted Stacks and Basement Archives scenes, focusing on temperature anomalies, impossible physics, and the evolving nature of the whispers from background noise to intelligible warnings.

Wildcard writer. Contributed surreal imagery and impossible geometry to the Hidden Chamber and Librarian's Office scenes, focusing on reality-bending architecture, self-writing texts, and the final revelation that reframes the entire haunting as a protective measure.
